programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Widow Hawkins tricks a couple of con men who first try to swindle her with an emerald known as "The Burma Rarity."

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A hot time on the old town nets the drovers assorted bruises, and a spirited girl bent on making the cowhands pay for wrecking her saloon.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Wrongly convicted Ed Stacy, whom Paladin helped to put in prison, is being released after being pardoned. Will Stanhope, who runs the local freight office, hires Paladin to protect him from Stacy. Paladin soon wonders who is really in danger.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Yoshika Nakamura comes west to find a man named Bill Timmons, who promised to marry her when he visited Japan. Yoshika hires Josh to help her locate Timmons, and during his venture learns about Japanese culture.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: All Gummed Up, Love At First Bite, Bedlam In Paradise, Blunder Boys, Crime On Their Hands, I'm A Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: "The Stooges run a drug store and are about to have their lease taken away by the Flint, the mean old man who owns the place. When Flint kicks his wife out for being old, the Stooges try to help her by inventing a formula that makes old people young. Their concoction turns the wife into a beautiful young woman, and Flint offers the boys the store for free if they'll transform him as well. They agree, but after he swallows the stuff he turns into an infant, and the boys leave on the run. , The Stooges reminisce about the girls they met overseas while in the military. As they wait for the girls' ship to arrive, they get drunk and Shemp winds up asleep with his feet in a tub of cement. After sobering up, they free Shemp with a dynamite blast that lands them at the dock where their sweethearts are waiting. , Set in the stone age, the stooges are cavemen who must have various misadventures hunting, gathering, and otherwise coping with prehistoric life. , Shemp dies but cannot get into heaven until he reforms Moe and Larry. He returns to earth as an invisible spirit and sets out to prevent the other two Stooges, who are in league with the devil, from selling a phony invention (a fountain pen that writes under whip cream) to a rich couple. Shemp sabotages Moe and Larry' plans and makes it through the pearly gates. , A parody of the television series Dragnet. , The Stooges are janitors working in a newspaper office. When an anonymous caller phones in a tip about the theft a famous diamond, the boys decide to become reporters and go after the crooks. They find the crooks, but Shemp accidentally swallows the diamond, which was hidden in a bowl of candy. The crooks want to cut the diamond out, but the boys foil them with the help of a friendly gorilla. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "One-of-a-kind alien invasion sci-fi featuring blood drinking alien clowns harvesting a small city."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: When Louie the Lilac kidnaps Bruce Wayne and Dick Grayson, it's up to Batgirl and Alfred to save them.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise seeks out a historical researcher with whom the Federation has lost contact, and discover he has contaminated a culture, remaking it into a near-duplicate of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: A Hindu Rakshasa terrorizes a Jewish neighborhood.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: A storm looms and the two gloves of Thor appear from space and fly straight into the waiting hands of Dr. Smith. They are then taken away by the real Thor, who will decide their fate.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The Seaview blunders into a minefield, where an explosion cripples the vessel and sends it to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: Two giant scientists capture Barry, Valerie, Fitzhugh, and Dan, and use them in a cloning experiment.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: Tony and Doug are at Khartoum in 1883 when the world is menaced by conquerors from outer space.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Aliens plot to make a new resilient race.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "Matt joins a gang to stop jewel thieves connected to car robberies."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Jessie meets her new stepbrother, Eric, soon discovering that he possesses a dark side.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Jessie's new stepbrother, Eric, runs afoul of the gang and even takes Mr. Belding's car apart.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When Zack falls for a college girl, he lies about his age and makes fake IDs so he, Slater and Screech can sneak into an 18-and-over dance club. While there, they see Kelly's boyfriend dancing with another girl.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The school holds a dance-date auction to pay for new cheerleading uniforms, with Zach, Slater and Screech up for auction. Jessie is appalled at the whole idea; meanwhile, Lisa becomes an intellectual to impress a smart boy.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When a girl is rejected from wrestling tryouts because she is female, Zack, who has a crush on her, will do whatever it takes to see that she makes the team.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Jessie becomes alarmed at the presence of Slater's old flame, especially when Screech's "love machine" shows that both Slater and his ex still have feelings for each other.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg is spotted puffing on a cigarette with some members of a rock band. Mike and Carol get word, but refrain from punishing him. However, it's not long before a pack of cigarettes falls out of his letterman jacket.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Jan Brady Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: Jan is upset when her friend, Lucy Winters, sends a birthday party invitation but accidentally addresses it to Marcia. Tired of being the middle blonde girl of the family, Jan tries to alter her appearance by buying a black wig, which she intends to wear to Lucy's upcoming birthday party. Meanwhile, Peter is horrified that Margie will be attending the party, a girl who has a major crush on him.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.sub-title: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard hires Fonzie's students to build a second bathroom. However, when he learns that the room will take all semester to complete, Howard fires Fonzie and the students and says he'll finish the bathroom himself.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank is making his usual contribution to his local councilman. After the guy has taken Frank's money, he tells him that he plans to tear down Cowboy Bill's and build a high-rise on top of it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, in a flurry of cost-cutting measures, saves money on beef by buying a whole side of it. Unfortunately, this happens at the same time her freezer breaks.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy misplaces two train tickets to Florida, she and Ethel consult the classified section, hoping to share a ride with someone driving south. They team up with a peculiar middle-aged woman, Mrs. Grundy, who's bent on getting to Florida in record time.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie has been seeing one particular girl, Cindy Andrews, and she wants to give Eddie a birthday gift, so she decides to knit a sweater. She uses Wally as a model and he begins spending so much time at Cindy's he arrouses the suspicions of Julie, Eddie, Lumpy, Beaver and his parents.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has been assigned to write a book report on 'The Three Musketeers.' However he's waited right down to the wire to get reading and quickly realizes that he'll never get finished. So, he decides to watch the movie that's going to be on TV and write his book report based on the movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Right after the Clampett's return from London, Granny gets a letter saying she is needed in Hooterville. The problem is that nobody knows where it is. Granny tries to find out, but doesn’t have much luck. Jethro, who isn't getting fed because Granny is focusing on Hooterville, is desperate for food and accidentally eats Elly's grits and rocks for her critters. Granny has to “doctor” him back to health.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny has been staying in Petticoat Junction, and her family is hungry. Elly May decides to take over the cooking, though her dishes are worse than eating nothing. The clan asks Granny to come home, but she says she can’t. So Jane suggests to Jethro that he hire a cook, and he ends up getting a gorgeous cook that only speaks Italian.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways are frightened as the sounds of battle, including hand grenades and machine guns, rock the island. The culprit turns out to be a gorilla who has found in an old WWII arsenal cave.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways begin to suffer from "island madness" due to the isolation. The Professor attempts to come up with a plan to lift everyone's spirits.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After Vint wins a talent contest, he changes his name to "Vinnie Vegas" and sets his sights on becoming an entertainer.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: Mama Who Came To Dinner (s2, ep)
programme.desc: Naomi talks Mama into letting her use the house for a dinner party, but when Mama suffers a back spasm the occasion is jeopardized.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A young bachelor must marry within the week in order to claim a $3 million inheritance; meanwhile, a drab widow poses as a glamorous adventuress and captures the heart of the captain. Also, a confirmed male chauvinist angers his fiancee, who finds comfort in sick bay with Doc. And, a scandal sheet reporter sets out to compile material for a sins-at-sea story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finds himself embroiled in a strange backwoods divorce ritual, ending up as the object of Charlene Darling's affections.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Voice actor and puppeteer Wally Wingert has a joyful obsession with the pop culture of the '60s through the 1980s, so much so that he's turned his Los Angeles home into what he calls "Wallywood": a virtual musem of treasures including Jack Lord's "Hawaii 5-O" ensemble (complete with height-enhancing boots), the actual passport of Ed McMahon (Wally's predecessor as "Tonight Show" announcer), the very first licensed Kermit puppet (from before he was even a frog), and the iconic stage costume of comedy legend Andy Kaufman... plus so much more! Lisa's invited "Collector's Call" favorite Rob Klein to put a value on Wally's entire collection... then to try to tempt him into a trade, an offer that comes down to a very small piece of colored resin with a very big '60s TV connection!"

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After black marketers hijack the 4077th's supply of hydrocortisone, Hawkeye and Trapper concoct a deal with local black marketer, Charlie Lee, to get some more. The catch: Henry's antique oak desk, which they must trade in order to get the medicine.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper and Hawkeye seek to keep a new nurse from being transferred by Hot Lips, and they vie for her affection. Henry Blake, challenged by another commander to a boxing tournament, makes Trapper fight a big, intimidating soldier in exchange for keeping the nurse at the 4077th.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie feels abandoned after Edith begins to volunteer part-time at the Sunshine Home for the Elderly.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie has difficuly keeping his blood pressure down for a company physical after the family launches into a heavy debate over the baby's name.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria suspects hanky-panky when she meets the beautiful blonde Mike's been tutoring after school hours.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Thanksgiving dinner becomes a family battleground when Archie discovers that Mike and Gloria don't want to impose the family's religious beliefs on their baby.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Mel Torme And Michele Lee
programme.desc: "Guests Mel Torme and Michele Lee. Originally aired on 01/18/71."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Flip Wilson And Vikki Carr
programme.desc: "Guests Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr. Originally aired on 01/19/70."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: It's A Shame She Married Me
programme.desc: Rob tries to hide Laura from a big-wig she used to date and who happens to be a sponsor for "The Alan Brady Show".

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: A Surprise Surprise Is A Surprise
programme.desc: Laura tries to give Rob a surprise birthday party.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: "Ralph sleeps at the Nortons' to avoid his visiting mother-in-law. "

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: You'll Be The Death Of Me (s2, ep)
programme.desc: A bride is overwhelmed by a growing fear that her companion committed a murder—and that she may be his next victim.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: "Dr. Kimble still fleeing with the woman he loves, decides to fake their deaths at sea, hoping it will fool Lieutenant Gerald forever."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dr. Erich Rojak and his wife Anna are being held in an underground laboratory/bunker by a totalitarian enemy government. Another unfriendly government has sent an assassin, Ventlos, to kill Rojak.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews attempts to catch three robbers before the statute of limitations runs out.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A new officer has been arrested for robbing a liquor store while on an undercover assignment.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Four bandits wearing red masks commit a series of robberies.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Two con men, posing as bank examiners, are bilking the elderly out of their life savings.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An elderly apartment manager is found to have been beaten to death with a hammer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: An older husband complains about his wife and friend's noisy karate practice. A hit and run traffic accident looks looks like a homicide. The officers use their investigative skills to locate the suspect and arrest him.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Happy National Teddy Bear Day from Bill, Toony, and of course, Teddy Roosevelt himself."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward is given two tickets to a baseball game and is faced with an impossible decision. Should he take Wally or Beaver? Beaver lets him off the hook when he announces he has plans with Gilbert. However, when they fall through, Beaver changes his mind about the game and becomes convinced because he's the youngest he gets the short stick.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A school dance has Beaver with a major dilemma. He has two girls who ask him to go with them. However, he has a little problem, he accepted the first invitation but now wants out of it when he's asked by the second girl. This leads him to take some of Eddie's poor advice.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Corresponding Corpse
programme.desc: Mason receives a telephone call from George Beaumont, a man who supposedly died in a plane crash nearly three years earlier. In reality, Beaumont missed the plane and after hearing about the accident decided to disappear.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When an abhorred doctor meets his end, four of his former medical students are considered likely suspects. Matlock, however, is tasked with defending the prime suspect, the man seen fleeing the scene of the crime.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A young refugee claims to be the son of a Sparta cop who died in the war. But quickly becomes a suspect in a murder/robbery after he accepts a ride with the criminals who actually committed the crime. Gillespie looks into his story, while Virgil and the boys track down the shooter. Meanwhile, the young man’s presence triggers a surprisingly bitter reaction from Parker, who views him as a painful reminder of the war.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Olivia wants this Christmas to be the best ever

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc is given the choice of saving the life of a man he saw commit a murder or delivering a baby. He choses to save the man first, and the baby dies in childbirth. The baby's father, Tom Butler, blames Doc and plans to get even.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The situation goes from bad to worse when Adam tries to smooth things over between a general store owner and the gunfighter who killed the man's son years earlier.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshal Torrance hostage, Lucas comes to the rescue.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk, but then falls into danger from a rattlesnake. When a stranger comes to his rescue, the grateful Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: The men are returning to St. Louis by stagecoach except for Flint, until he becomes the driver to help a friend. They are forced to take a detour through Mexico by other passengers.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed puts his reputation on the line when he decides to file a formal complaint against a fellow officer after witnessing him use excessive force. On patrol, he and Malloy search for suspects in two separate robberies.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed's investigation of a fatal shooting in a hotel room hinges on the eyewitness account of a hopeless wino named Harry who is desperate to make a name for himself. Meanwhile, they investigate a report of a peeping tom at the home of an exotic dancer.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank Burns complains about Hawkeye Pierce's disrespect, and when Henry appoints Hawkeye chief surgeon, it's to Burns' shock. The rest of the 4077th "coronates" Hawk while Frank and Hot Lips complain to General Barker.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sergeant Baker arrives at the camp with his "moose." Hawkeye decides to find a way of getting her away from Baker. He tries ordering him to release her, tries buying her and then resorts to cheating at cards. He releases her but she won't go, so he tries to teach her how to be independent.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th is designated as the setting for the making of an army film on Mobile Army Surgical Hospital units. Hawkeye is chosen as the star while Margaret and Frank compose a screenplay. Hawkeye objects to the piece of propaganda that filmmaker Lt. Bricker is producing and, having exposed the original film, reshoots a new one his way.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Henry goes for some R&R, Hawkeye pretends to crack up so that Frank will let him and Trapper go on some R&R.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: In their efforts to win a pony, Opie and his friends become involved in a scam that has them shilling a useless miracle salve.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are working late at the courthouse when they get a visit from two wild women. Out of pure kindness, they drive the "fun girls" home, but don't know that Helen and Thelma Lou saw them with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Countess Maria comes to Beverly Hills, making Mrs. Drysdale very excited. But she wants to keep the countess away from the hillbillies. However, it's spring tonic time, and Granny passes it around the neighborhood, including at Countess Maria's house. She falls in love with the brew and visits the Clampetts. They become friends instantly. She starts falling for Jed, and has plans to marry her 6th husband, hoping it is an American.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver will make considerable more on his apple crop if he gets his to market first. He hires local highschoolers to pick the fruit and uses their old truck to haul them. As the rickety truck suffers numerous breakdowns, the apple prices begin to drop. Finally, Lisa's hotcakes come to the rescue.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: That's No Lady, That's My Spy
programme.desc: Newkirk poses as a general's wife to get penicillin to an ill underground leader.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan arranges for a beautiful Russian spy to convince Klink that the Kommandant should volunteer for service at the Russian front. Hogan's payoff: some secret papers.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Soupy Sales And Mel Torme
programme.desc: "Guests Soupy Sales and Mel Torme. Originally aired on 01/26/70."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Bullied Bowler
programme.desc: After a struggling bowling alley is shut down at the insistence of a domineering townswoman, a doctor involved in the closure is found murdered.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A contract assassin reneges after meeting his target's handicapped wife.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When the daughter of one of Mannix's friends is kidnapped, the captors demand that the man lose a large sum of money in a card game as her ransom.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A writer was murdered. His latest book would deal with the biography of an industrialist. Cannon must protect the co-author and investigate the activities of the industrialist.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A dog is the prime suspect in the fatal mauling of a man whose stepson is the dog's owner.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews searches for the murderers of a fellow officer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to figure out a pattern to a series of candy store hold-ups. The solution comes when they discover that there are two suspects.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: "Gannon goes undercover as a buyer in order to trap fur thieves"

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and his date join Reed and his expecting wife on a weekend trip to a ghost town, but soon they cross paths with a dangerous motorcycle gang.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill receives a special invitation to attend the homecoming dance at his old high school."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie is happy to break the news that he plans to spend his summer on a fishing boat in Alaska and this prompts Wally and Lumpy to think about signing up to do the same thing. However, they all get a dose of reality when they discover just what kind of conditions they would be living in.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: It's come down to the final week before junior high school graduation and Beaver is having a ball and even skips a class with Gilbert. However, Beaver becomes convinced he won't graduate after Gilbert and him take a peek at the diplomas on Mrs. Rayburn's desk and find Beaver's diploma to be missing.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lucky Loser
programme.desc: Mason has all kinds of trouble when a murder brings him into the tangled financial and personal affairs of the wealthy Balfour family.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock flies to England to represent Eric Gordon, a man accused of murdering his wealthy businessman father. While his sister is convinced of his innocence, his brother isn't so sure.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The F.B.I. tries to talk an ex-boxer into testifying against a mobster he once worked for, but the fighter sees the situation as an opportunity for blackmail.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A wild mustang is captured on Walton land and Grandpa wants it to remain be and remain free

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Three bounty hunters hold hostages in the Long Branch in an effort to get Matt to turn over a prisoner to them.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.sub-title: The Many Faces Of Gideon Flinch
programme.desc: Bullethead Burke is looking for a man he says cheated him out of $5,000 dollars. The man's niece tricks Little Joe and Hoss into helping her uncle out. A pickpocket escapes from jail and complicates matters even more.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rambunctious teenager wrecks a schoolroom, Lucas McCain, as a member of the North Fork school board, asks the boy's reluctant uncle to pay for the damages.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor, Abel MacDonald, who tells Lucas to keep off his land and won't allow his son to become friends with Mark. However, McCain decides he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: During any wagon train trip, the challenges and losses faced turn the greenhorn into a seasoned veteran.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: It's Malloy's birthday, but he's consumed with anger over the thought his colleagues might have a plan to throw him a surprise party. On a busy patrol, he and Reed make an ironic traffic stop while responding to a burglary call at an antique store, deal with an extremely embarrassed theft victim at a lingerie store, investigate suspicious activity at a service station, use a creative approach to apprehend a serial jewelry store burglar and engage in a shootout inside the police station's parking garage.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed suspect that a well-armed immigrant tailor who claims to be defending his establishment from burglars is actually plotting a murder. In the meantime, they deal with a drunken traveling businessman who passes out in a bar girl's car.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: John Hodges, a chopper pilot referred to as The Cowboy, has been hit in the shoulder, and arrives at the 4077th. He is expecting a letter—he's worried that his wife, Jean, is leaving him for another man. He wants to go home, but Henry refuses, stating Cowboy's wound isn't serious enough to merit a stateside ticket. Bad luck then follows Henry Blake like the seat of his pants!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Col. Henry Blake is transferred to Tokyo and Frank starts imposing military discipline on the camp, the surgeons will do anything to get Henry back.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A rash of thefts breaks out in the camp. Missing pieces include Frank's silver picture frame, Margaret's hair brush and Trapper's watch. The camp is searched and everything is found in Hawkeye's locker.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye moves a wounded North Korean soldier into The Swamp, rather than let him be shipped out before he's stable. During the night he and Trapper play Dracula, and siphon off a pint of Frank's blood. The soldier then contracts hepatitis, so they have to test Frank without him knowing, and have to keep him away from Margaret and the patients.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee gets upset when Malcolm Merriweather returns to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Barney sees Andy kissing Helen in a jewelry store, he gets the idea that they are engaged. So he starts planning an engagement party and gets the whole town involved.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: For Granny’s birthday, the Clampetts plan to surprise her with some land in the country. Jed calls a number Jethro saw an ad for. However, the Clampetts do not know they are calling a cemetery. After a misunderstanding, the men from the cemetery begin believing the Clampetts are cold-blooded killers, having killed an entire family named Green, Granny and Mrs. Drysdale.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph Monroe finds herself smitten with Hank Kimball, but discovers that he won't date a woman with a man's name. She asks Oliver to file court papers to have her name changed to something more feminine. While in court, Oliver learns that his license to practice law is not recognized by the state. This sends Oliver back to the books to study for the state's bar exam.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink is appointed defense counsel for a German officer on trial for treason who has secret plans intended for London. Hogan helps Klink prove the officer's innocence in order to secure the plans.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The guys find a new rocket that has landed near camp. They are at a loss on how to get it back to England for study when Marya and her rocket-designing husband enter camp.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Barbara Feldon And Joan Rivers
programme.desc: "Guests Barbara Feldon and Joan Rivers. Originally aired on 02/02/70."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Shifty Shoebox
programme.desc: Robbery, embezzlement and a coverup at a trucking company end in the murder of one of the owners.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before a match, forcing its manager to take its place in the ring.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: Nothing Ever Happens In Linvale (s2, ep)
programme.desc: An eye-catching widow tries to convince an incredulous police officer that her neighbor murdered his partner.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: One might think that after waking from a year-long coma, the worst would be in the past. But that is not true for Mannix's client, injured in a hit-and-run accident and now the target of killers.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon delivers a ransom, but the deal goes bad and Cannon winds up with no memory of the event, kidnappers on his trail, and people willing to exploit his lack of memory.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is hired to replace a detective who was murdered while looking for a woman's biological mother.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews tracks down a ring of expert forgers.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $200,000 worth of imperial jade is reported stolen. Friday and Gannon determine the burglary was an inside job.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot while making a routine check on a pair of paroled convicts parked near a liquor store.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed's wife is in the hospital expecting their first child, and Reed soon regrets his decision to report for work as usual. Out on patrol, they encounter a drunken man directing traffic, chase down a robbery suspect, investigate the theft of money from washing machines and become involved in a minor traffic accident that results in a major delay.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony have Georgia on ther minds."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Eddie fall prey to Lumpy's practical joking after he plants cherry bombs under the hoods of Eddie's car and Wally's car. Both Eddie and Wally want to get him back but their plan goes awry when they destroy Lumpy's car after chaining it to a tree. All fingers point to Wally after Fred finds that the chain has Ward's name printed on it.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After graduation, an all-night party is set to begin, which has June and Ward very wary. They aren't sure if they should allow Wally to attend. Meanwhile, Wally's date for the party has the same problem. This leads her to invite Wally to meet her folks and put their worries to rest.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Pint-sized Client
programme.desc: Robbers lift a bundle from the Hargrove Finance Company and Frank Anderson is murdered in the aftermath. Anthony "Pop" Renzi is identified as one of the robbers and charged with both the robbery and the murder. Mason sets out to clear him of both charges.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock flies to England to represent Eric Gordon, a man accused of murdering his wealthy businessman father. While his sister is convinced of his innocence, his brother isn't so sure.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A longtime friend of the Chief makes threats against a doctor he believes is responsible for his wife's death .When the doctor is killed he becomes the prime suspect. But Gillespie doubts his guilt - even after he confesses.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Another woman begins to play the church organ instead of Grandma which upsets Grandma

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Kansas raider Judge Proctor and his men ride into Dodge looking for a man they blame for stealing their land during the war. With Matt out of town, Festus has to try to keep peace and keep the renegades from burning the town.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe befriends and takes responsibility for an ex-convict named Danny. Danny loves horses and is not used to people's ways on the outside of jail. Will his rough jailhouse upbringing mar any hopes of friendship?

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A reporter has joined the wagon train. When the Major finds out he is a she, he has his hands full, especially when curiosity jeopardizes everyone's safety and their right to vote.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed investigate an interstate bounty hunter who has an invalid gun permit and questionable tactics. Meanwhile, they deal with an elderly man who strongly dislikes hippies, and a frustrated wife who desperately wants to receive a traffic ticket.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On an unseasonably hot day, Malloy and Reed suspect that an elusive bicyclist who overreacts to having his air pump stolen in a park is actually a drug pusher. Meanwhile, their investigation of a two-month-long yard sale leads to an armed fugitive.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye writes home, describing Christmas in Korea: Radar ships a jeep home, a piece at a time; Henry gives the monthly lecture on sex, with the aid of figure A and figure B; Trapper helps deliver a calf; Klinger and Frank get into a fight, but Father Mulcahy smoothes things over; Hawkeye and Trapper sabotage Margaret's tent; Hawkeye flies to the front line dressed as Santa to help a wounded soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The nurses go to extreme lengths to find a date for Nurse Eddie—they won't go out with anyone until Eddie gets a date. The men draw straws, and Hawkeye is the big loser, especially after Eddie nearly kills him in a scene resembling teenage "mating" rituals.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets a Dear John recording from home. Hawkeye and Trapper try to set him up with a date, but fail. Radar is taken by a new nurse at the camp and she is into poetry and music, so they coach him. Margaret wants to stop the relationship, so Hawkeye and Trapper get between her and Frank until she relents. Radar's "Ahhhh, Bach!" and "That's highly significant" quotes win him the girl.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye creates a fake doctor, Captain Jonathan S. Tuttle, to give supplies to the local orphans. Henry wants Tuttle to be officer of the day, so Hawkeye creates a fake personnel file, and all his back pay is given to the orphanage. When General Clayton wants to reward his generosity, Hawkeye is forced to invent a story about Tuttle jumping from a chopper without his parachute!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Gomer naively tells Thelma Lou that Barney thinks "he has her in his hip pocket." Thelma Lou decides to teach Barney a lesson by flirting with Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, Barney and Gomer take a group of boys camping in the mountains to show them the pioneer life. Barney winds up getting himself and Gomer lost in the woods, and it's up to Andy to save the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny gets a letter from home, from Adeline Ashley, a hillbilly socialite. Miss Ashley says she going to stop by while visiting friends. However, she arrives early. And through her whole visit, she sets her sights on marrying Jed. Jed isn’t at all interested, but hopes that Miss Ashley could meet Mrs. Drysdale and arranges it.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa agreed to try out Green Acres for six months. Today's the day she decides whether to stay in Hooterville or return to New York. Everyone anxiously awaits her decision. In the meantime, Oliver flashes back to their first days on the farm, his physical mishaps around the house, and Haney's lousy products.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a U.S. general out of Stalag 13, while Klink plans to move the camp's fence line and Gertrude arrives with her fiancé.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hogan is identified as a saboteur, he impersonates a German officer in front of the very Gestapo agent who could take him down.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: "Family Sketch Show. Originally aired on 02/16/70."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Tragic Trophy
programme.desc: A Hollywood wheeler-dealer is in desperate need of cash and has gotten himself in some trouble with the ladies. But before things can get any worse, he turns up dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is given a stopwatch that allows him to halt time.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: When his child is accused of murder, former actor Miles Crawford decides to "act" as the boy's legal representative.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Winifred, private secretary and lover of the publisher George Diamond, becomes a runaway witness when a woman falls into the sea and drowns after a quarrel.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Kathy Ackers hires Cannon to find out why her father, a banker, committed suicide at a Caribbean resort. She thinks he was murdered, and wants Cannon to prove it. But the man was embezzling from his own bank, so maybe he did have a motive to kill himself..."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A young man's long-range plans clash with his girlfriend's personal ambition, leading them to commit murder out of greed.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews must prove a patrolman's innocence before a newspaper prints the story.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon use newspapers, radio and TV to publicize their clues to the identity of a hit-and-run driver.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday goes undercover with the department's chaplain in order to bust a gambling ring.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A former convict and informant who Malloy helped give a second chance is accused of assaulting a priest, dealing drugs and stealing a gun after being fired from his dish-washing job at Duke's Longhorn Café. Malloy and Reed set out to determine if his story, which is full of suspicious coincidences, is actually true.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "In a special 800th episode, extra ordinary best friends Bill and Toony discuss other unconventional pairings, from frenemies to cuisine."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has the chance to travel around the country for six weeks during the summer and he's all excited about it. However, he quickly realizes when he's gone Gilbert will go after the girl Beaver has a crush on, Mary Margaret. But he quickly realizes, there's more to life than Mary Margaret.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver's school is having a clothing drive and whoever brings in the most clothes will be awarded 1,000 school points. June, Ward and Wally round up all the old clothes they can find and put them in a box. However, next to the box are three good suits of Ward's that are to be cleaned, and, of course, Beaver mistakes them as items for the clothing drive.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Sardonic Sergeant
programme.desc: Major Frank Lessing, a payroll officer on an Army base, is found murdered and Sergeant Joseph Dexter is charged with the crime. The case hinges on a payroll robbery committed in the Philippines years before.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Michelle defends college chum Andrea Morrow after she is accused of murdering her abusive lover, Clay Graham. Matlock soon becomes convinced that the murderer was Clay's blind friend, Arthur Hampton, but has a devil of a time proving how a blind man managed to carry off a near-perfect murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A man murders his wife and her lover after he catches them together, then flees to a remote cabin with his daughter who does not know what he has done. The chief and the boys hope to talk him into surrendering without resorting to violence.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Elizabeth has nightmares about being trapped on a Ferris wheel.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus is escorting wounded prisoner Riley Sharp to Dodge. They are forced to stop at a farmhouse, where Sharp's ex-wife and her brutish husband live.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Unsettling events that could spell financial ruin for the Ponderosa mysteriously coincide with the arrival of a wealthy countess who seems determined to win the love of Ben Cartwright, the man she spurned 20 years before in New Orleans.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Although a drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, railroad executives are afraid that their workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim that he has found a way to make rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshal Torrance's odd behavior toward the man. Then three men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the stranger.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint finds a young man bleeding to death and a knife nearby. He takes the body to the sheriff who identifies the man as the youngest Zamora brother. He feels duty-bound to kill the murderer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed begin today's patrol by investigating a deluded and reclusive parolee whose troubled girlfriend in the apartment next door has just attempted suicide for the second time. In the meantime, they provide vital information to a detective's search for an armed robbery suspect.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy's headstrong and elderly apartment manager stages a protest at the station after she's victimized by a serial purse snatcher, and Malloy suggests a stakeout will be their only chance to apprehend the suspect. On patrol, he and Reed chase a suspicious vehicle into a lumber yard, and investigate the murder of a young man at his parents' home.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper operate on a famous Colonel - after discovering that he is particularly ruthless about sacrificing his men, they come up with a scheme to get him sent back to the states with a little unwitting help from Frank, Margaret, and a drunk Henry.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank throws his back out while spending the evening with Margaret, and ends up in traction. He promptly applies for the Purple Heart, having been 'technically' wounded at a frontline unit. Tommy Gillis, an old friend of Hawkeye's, is writing a book about the war, and pays him a visit.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Once again, Hawkeye writes home to his father, telling him of the latest gossip: the camp gets a new surgeon, who turns out to be a fake; Hawkeye bets he can walk into the mess tent naked for lunch and no one will notice; and Radar cheats on his final exam.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp suffers from the severe cold, except for Hawkeye who has received some long johns from his father. They get passed around from person to person as a gift, a gambling stake, a trade, a bribe, stolen and given up to Father Mulcahy, who ends up giving them away.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer comes to the courthouse one day with an announcement—he has decided to join the Marines, believing it a test of his manhood.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie develops a crush on his teacher, Helen Crump, at the school dance. He spends .74 cents to buy her a gift.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is practicing being a Navy Frogman. Granny, who has been testing her flu serum, a.k.a. moonshine, sees Jethro and thinks there is a monster in the pool. When she tells Jed, he thinks it is a result of her moonshine. But Granny finally is shown that it isn’t a monster, but Jethro. Jed decides that Jethro needs some type of guidance, so he calls Miss Jane, who tells Drysdale.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb is sent packing when Darlene's dad learns he proposed to is daughter with a watch fob instead of a ring. Lisa gives Eb the $2000 ring Oliver used to get engaged to her and everyone is happy--until the father has the ring appraised.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to get a Russian pilot, who refuses to escape to London, back to Russia.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan becomes the partner of a beautiful underground agent when he and his men team up with the underground to destroy a guided missile battery.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Pat Carroll And Jack Jones
programme.desc: "Guests Pat Carroll and Jack Jones. Originally aired on 02/23/70."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Reckless Rockhound
programme.desc: When a businessman responsible for decimating a local mining business returns to town, it is not long before he is found murdered.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Last Night Of A Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A medical undergraduate tries to get his roommate off the bottle by making him believe he killed a young woman while in a drunken trance.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix searches for Australian sailor Paul Gantry, who is supposedly due to inherit a million dollars.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Reclusive Virginia McKellar insists her sister did not die five years earlier, as everyone believes, and she'll willing to pay Cannon to prove it.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A woman hires Barnaby to find her missing husband and the detective's investigation uncovers bigamy, blackmail and murder.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews works hard to outsmart three desperate criminals who resort to using a clever ruse.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday learns about a scam artist with a novel twist: he uses an authentic Congressional Medal of Honor to solicit magazine subscriptions.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A Japanese widow is senselessly murdered, leaving her small daughter an orphan. Friday has a hard time controlling his emotions while seeking the killer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed feels a strong sense of accomplishment when he stumbles upon a large stash of narcotics as he secures a residence after executing a traffic warrant with Malloy and Officer Ed Wells. He's in for a rude awakening at the trial, however, when he's cross examined by the defense attorney.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "On this spooky day, Bill and Toony talk horror, zombies, and more, with the help of a special guest."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While cleaning, June runs across an old family scrapbook and gathers the family together to reminisce about the past six years. The Cleavers recall scenes from previous episodes including: 'Beaver Gets 'Spelled,'' 'New Neighbors,' 'My Brother's Girl,' 'The Shave,' 'Beaver Runs Away,' 'Larry Hides Out,' 'Teacher Comes to Dinner,' and 'Wally's Election.'

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver's teacher, Miss Canfield, sends a note home with Beaver and the other kids convince him that it's news that he's getting kicked out of school. So Beaver and Wally take steps to hide the note from Ward and June."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Curious Bride
programme.desc: Rhoda Reynolds is charged with murdering her blackmailing ex-husband, Arthur Kane. At the trial, Mason moves the proceedings to the room in which Kane was murdered in order to re-enact the fatal night.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: At Cassie's request, Matlock reluctantly agrees to represent a famous wrestler accused of killing a long-time rival. The key witness is a young girl whose story might not be completely accurate.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba refuses to believe that a former teammate embezzled funds from the bank where he worked. And sets out to prove that his friend was framed and murdered. Harriet hopes that art therapy can help the man's traumatized son, who becomes a target himself when the killer realizes he witnessed the crime.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The forestry student who previously visited Waltons Mountain (in "The Competition"") now returns

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt is taking a signed confession paper to a judge that will hang a man. The man has put a reward on the paper causing two bounty hunters to shoot Matt in an effort to get it. Matt is taken in by a group of freed slaves heading west who are being pursued by hunters.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While working at the Ponderosa, wrangler Johnny Lightly suffers an accident that costs him the use of both legs. Though Dr. Kay theorizes that the injuries may not last, Johnny has given up the will to live.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's finding the body of a murder victim starts Lucas, his friend, Artemus, and Marshal Torrance on a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshal Torrance joins with U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Elizabeth McQueeny is traveling with her girls, heading to a finishing school in the west. When her real purpose becomes known, all the females want her gone but her worth shows itself before that can happen.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed starts a flu epidemic that decimates the city's police force, forcing him and Malloy to work a double shift. During day watch, he and Malloy encounter a bookmaker being held at gunpoint, mediate a dispute over a cantaloupe, investigate a possible robbery in progress, engage in a foot chase with an athletic young man and pull over a motorist who turns out to be a VIP.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Newly appointed Police Commissioner Edna Dixon accompanies Malloy and Reed on night watch, where they deal with a naked elderly wino at a bar, try to diffuse a possible riot situation following a gang-related stabbing and pursue a deaf teenager in a stolen car.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp tunes into the Army/Navy football game, only to be shelled and have an unexploded bomb land in the middle of the compound. They ring around trying to identify the bomb, and the camp prepares for the worst. Hawkeye and Trapper are left the task of following instructions to disarm the bomb.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Frank argue over Frank's surgical ability. Hawkeye performs a difficult operation and the patient does not recover as he should. Hawkeye begins to doubt his ability and moves out of The Swamp. He decides to open up his patients again, and discovers a nick in the colon that even Frank admits anyone could have missed.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank's normal drone of verbal abuse upsets Ginger, so Hawkeye puts his arm in a cast while he is asleep. Frank puts in for a transfer, and after Franks tells Margaret he's leaving, she decides to leave as well. As a result, Col. Blake puts both Hawk and Trap on double post-op duty until he finds replacements for Majs. Burns and Houlihan.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: General Clayton calls to say that a ceasefire is to be declared. The camp celebrates, Klinger gives away his dresses and locals start to take pieces of the camp. But Trapper does not believe it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney learns that in order to pass the mandatory physical for the deputy's office, he must weigh more and be taller. Andy and Aunt Bee try to stretch him and fatten him up, until Andy comes up with the solution.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Taylors quickly realize why they haven't invited Bee's sister and her husband, Ollie, for a visit in more than a decade. When Uncle Ollie borrows Andy's squad car to go fishing, it's the final straw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is getting ready to enter the reserves, and the Clampetts are giving him a party, with gifts, including lady fingers, a squirrel rifle and a Confederate uniform. Jethro heads down to the reserve where they are preparing to shoot a Civil War movie. The men there think Jethro is an actor for the movie. Jethro soon thinks that the Civil War is going to happen again and rushes home to tell Granny and Elly. Granny decides to take up the fight to make sure the South wins, again, since she is convinced they won the first time.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Sam Drucker's off for a two-week vacation to visit his sister, leaving Oliver to take over his duties as deputy sheriff. Complications ensue when Oliver demonstrates how to use a pair of handcuffs to Lisa before discovering that he's lost the keys.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Lieutenant Carter enters the camp and Hogan discovers a spy among his men.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The POWs smuggle a tiger tank, about which Klink has been boasting, into camp in order to photograph and study it.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Jane Connell And Tim Conway
programme.desc: "Guests Jane Connell and Tim Conway. Originally aired on 03/02/70."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Latent Lover
programme.desc: A man left unhinged by his wife's affair has been acting out in very strange ways, even attempting to rob a bank in his despair. And when his wife ends up murdered, he is the natural suspect.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Old Man In The Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after nuclear war destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A break-in gang's newest heist may be their last: the booty contains a radioactive capsule.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Syndicate thugs have kidnapped an informer—or so they believe. Their victim is actually Peggy Fair, Mannix's secretary, which puts the detective on their trail.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The man who arranged the death of an embezzler cannot find the loot. But Cannon might, when he investigates on behalf of the man framed for the murder. But Cannon's client might be closer to the case than he lets on.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An art collector's wife plots to steal one of his paintings, but her plan is complicated by her husband's death.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Billie Jo becomes jealous of her sweetheart, aviator Steve Elliott, and her youngest sister, Betty Jo.
